title: rotala rotundifolia var. macrandra
intro: Rotala rotundifolia var. macrandra is a variant of the Rotala rotundifolia plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Lythraceae. It is commonly known as a beautiful aquatic plant used in aquariums and water gardens, valued for its vibrant red color and delicate flower blooms. In traditional Chinese medicine, the Rotala rotundifolia plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving coughs, and supporting immune function, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
